candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: See the following phase diagram below, where there are 5 points labeled as (A), (B), (C), (D), and (E), respectively. At which point will the substancemce represented by the phase diagram be solely in the solid phase at equilibrium?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 请参见下面的相图,其中有5点标记为(a)、(b)、(c)、(d)和(e)。$\textless$图像1$\textgreater$在哪个点上,相图表示仅在平衡时存在固相?
